impact: Prevents the daemon from asking for solar extractor implementation work unless the generated prompt explicitly carries the one-file, no-dataclass, syntax-sentinel-preserving, seven-record expected-output constraints, reducing repeat syntax and scope failures.
summary: Add solar extractor prompt preflight to the PP&D daemon.
target_task: Task checkbox-85: Add a daemon prompt preflight check that refuses to ask for the solar extractor implementation unless the prompt explicitly names the one-file, no-dataclass, syntax-sentinel-preserving, seven-record expected-output constraints.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
